moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, begins its main draw on Monday, June 29th, with qualifying rounds currently underway and the official draw on June 26th.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Strawberries & cream at the ready! Wimbledon 2026 main draw begins Monday. Who are you rooting for this year?

angles.name: Local Connection
angles.copy: Devon tennis fans, it's almost time! Wimbledon main draw starts Monday. Who's making it through the early rounds to reach Centre Court glory?

moments.title: Duran Duran Headline BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: New Wave legends Duran Duran are set to headline American Express Presents BST Hyde Park on Sunday, July 5th, with special guests including Scissor Sisters and Nile Rodgers & CHIC.

angles.name: Duran Duran Focus
angles.copy: Hungry Like the Wolf for live music? Duran Duran are headlining BST Hyde Park on July 5th! What's your ultimate Duran Duran anthem?

angles.name: 80s & 90s Vibe
angles.copy: Get ready for a New Wave takeover! Duran Duran, Scissor Sisters, and Nile Rodgers & CHIC hit BST Hyde Park July 5th. What a line-up!

moments.title: Lewis Capaldi Closes BST Hyde Park
moments.blurb: Scottish singer-songwriter Lewis Capaldi will close out American Express Presents BST Hyde Park with two headline shows on July 11th and 12th.

angles.name: Capaldi Excitement
angles.copy: Someone You Loved is playing BST Hyde Park! Lewis Capaldi takes to the stage for two huge shows on July 11th & 12th.

angles.name: Weekend Vibes
angles.copy: London, get ready for an emotional weekend! Lewis Capaldi wraps up BST Hyde Park with two massive gigs on July 11th and 12th.

moments.title: British Grand Prix at Silverstone
moments.blurb: The Formula 1 Pirelli British Grand Prix takes place at Silverstone from July 2nd to 5th, featuring four days of racing action and live music from artists like David Guetta and James Arthur.

angles.name: F1 & Music Combo
angles.copy: Vroom vroom! The British Grand Prix hits Silverstone July 2-5, bringing high-speed F1 action AND live music from David Guetta, James Arthur and more.

angles.name: Race Weekend Anticipation
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The British Grand Prix is just a week away. Who's your pick for the podium at Silverstone?

moments.title: England Men vs New Zealand Test
moments.blurb: England Men's cricket team continues their 3rd Test match against New Zealand at Trent Bridge today, June 25th, concluding on June 29th.

angles.name: Live Cricket Update
angles.copy: It's Day 1 of the 3rd Test! England are battling New Zealand at Trent Bridge today. Keep up with all the action!

angles.name: Test Match Drama
angles.copy: Another exciting Test match underway! England vs New Zealand at Trent Bridge. What are your predictions for this crucial game?

moments.title: England Men vs India T20I Series
moments.blurb: England Men's white-ball side begins a five-match T20 International series against India on Wednesday, July 1st, starting in Durham.

angles.name: Upcoming T20 Excitement
angles.copy: Get ready for some T20 fireworks! England Men take on India in a five-match series starting July 1st. Who's excited?

angles.name: White-Ball Clash
angles.copy: The summer of cricket continues! England vs India in a huge T20I series kicks off next week. Big hitting guaranteed!

moments.title: Love Island UK Season 13 Heats Up
moments.blurb: Love Island UK Season 13, hosted by Maya Jama, continues nightly (except Saturdays) on ITV2 and ITVX, with new islanders and drama unfolding in Majorca.

angles.name: Reality TV Buzz
angles.copy: The villa drama continues! Love Island UK is on tonight. Who's coupled up, and who's about to be dumped?

angles.name: Daily Catch-Up
angles.copy: Did you tune into Love Island last night? Catch up on all the gossip and predictions before tonight's episode!

moments.title: Ye Headlines Wireless Festival
moments.blurb: Ye (formerly Kanye West) is set to headline all three days of Wireless Festival at Finsbury Park, London, from July 10th to 12th.

angles.name: Music Festival Hype
angles.copy: London, get ready! Ye is headlining all three days of Wireless Festival, July 10-12. What tracks are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Hip Hop Buzz
angles.copy: Three nights of Ye at Wireless Festival! Who's heading to Finsbury Park for the ultimate summer hip-hop experience?

moments.title: Carly Simon's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for hits like 'You're So Vain,' turns 81 today. She was born on June 25, 1945.

angles.name: Celebrating a Legend
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the incredible Carly Simon! What's your favourite song from this iconic singer-songwriter?

moments.title: Chris Isaak's Birthday
moments.blurb: American rockabilly singer-songwriter Chris Isaak, famous for 'Wicked Game,' turns 70 tomorrow. He was born on June 26, 1956.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Birthday Tease
angles.copy: Get ready to wish a very happy 70th birthday to the cool crooner Chris Isaak tomorrow! 'Wicked Game' still gives us chills.

moments.title: Shirley Manson's Birthday
moments.blurb: Scottish singer Shirley Manson, lead vocalist of Garbage, turns 60 tomorrow. She was born on June 26, 1966.

angles.name: Alternative Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're celebrating the incredible Shirley Manson of Garbage as she turns 60! What's your favourite Garbage track?

moments.title: Debbie Harry's Birthday
moments.blurb: Iconic Blondie frontwoman Debbie Harry, known for hits like 'Heart of Glass' and 'Call Me,' celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1st. She was born on July 1, 1945.

angles.name: Punk Icon Celebration
angles.copy: The legendary Debbie Harry turns 81 on July 1st! Get ready to celebrate the queen of Blondie and her timeless hits.

moments.title: Missy Elliott's Birthday
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott, a true music innovator, celebrates her 55th birthday on July 1st. She was born on July 1, 1971.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1st. What's your favourite track from this absolute legend?

moments.title: Huey Lewis's Birthday
moments.blurb: American singer Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for 'The Power of Love,' celebrates his 76th birthday on July 5th. He was born on July 5, 1950.

angles.name: 80s Icon Birthday
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square, and it's also Huey Lewis's 76th birthday on July 5th! What's your go-to Huey Lewis and the News hit?

moments.title: The Open Championship Final Qualifying
moments.blurb: Final qualifying events for The 154th Open Championship will be played on June 30th at four locations across the UK, ahead of the main tournament in mid-July.

angles.name: Golf Qualifying Buzz
angles.copy: The tension is building! Final qualifying for The Open Championship happens June 30th. Who will earn their spot at Royal Birkdale?

angles.name: Road to Royal Birkdale
angles.copy: Amateurs and pros battling it out for a dream spot in The Open! Final Qualifying is just days away. Good luck to all!
